## slugify(text) in text_utils.py - stdlib only (re, unicodedata):
normalize NFKD -> ascii, lowercase, re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", sep), strip
separator is re.sub's repl, so a separator
containing \1 / \g<1> is parsed as a backreference -> re.error
fix: re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", lambda _: separator, ...). else production-ready.
